economic_notes: Nation has 28 Government Business Enterprises (GBEs) accounted for by modified equity method with combined revenue of $96.1M and net loss of $3.2M. GBEs include oilfield services, catering, security, hotel, casino, sawmill, gas, land, and environmental companies. Nation has provided $39M in guarantees on GBE credit facilities with $34.8M outstanding. Nation capitalized $579,505 of infrastructure work performed by GBEs.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on GBE investments and equity method adjustments. Nation consolidated 3 entities (Cold Lake First Nations, CLFN FNDF Corporation, Nu Ch'anie Society) with 28 GBEs on modified equity method. GBEs had combined net loss of $3.17M. Significant interest payable to Primrose Lake Trust of $6.23M included in accounts payable. Contributions carried forward treated as deferred revenue ($7.69M). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $14.44M + FNIHB $3.07M + FNDF $4.38M + Other government grants $1.60M + Dene Ts'edi Society grants $1.46M = $24.95M. No schedule of remuneration provided. No housing units or population data disclosed.
